text: Recall that 1 degree equals 60 minutes. We must first convert the minutes to a fraction of a degree.
Part (iii): Let's convert 40 degrees and 20 minutes. 20 minutes is 20 over 60 degrees, which is 1 over 3 degrees.
Now multiply 121 over 3 degrees by pi over 180. This gives 121 pi over 540 radians.
Part (iv): Convert minus 37 degrees and 30 minutes. 30 minutes is half a degree, giving minus 75 over 2 degrees.
Multiplying minus 75 over 2 degrees by pi over 180 simplifies to minus 5 pi over 24 radians.
